2178830.name: Disco Tomb Demo
2178830.description:
Space droids invaded Egypt and angered our mummy pharaoh during his party. Time to strike back!
Fight off countless waves of enemies and recover your disco balls!
Go through Egypt, Mexico and even hell to put an end to this invasion! The only friends that you'll make along the way will be your guns! Don't worry about enemies, we're sure that you will make lots of them from all the available factions!

Disco Tomb is a sci-fi retro FPS / boomer shooter made in the style of the good old day's shooters like Quake, Doom, Serious Sam, Shadow Warrior & Duke Nukem!
It features some goofy plots and an epic story all in one game! With a serious campaign and not so serious secret levels to take the edge off once in a while!
Use magic spells AND guns to fight your way through huge waves of enemies in freaky dungeons or out in the open desert against the hordes of the invaders!
Oblivion awaits!
2178830.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
